blocks.title: Grade Example

blocks.content: Try changing the score to see different grades!

blocks.title: Time of Day
💡 Order Matters
blocks.content: The computer checks conditions from top to bottom and stops at the first one that's true. Put the most specific conditions first!

questions.question: In an if-else if-else chain, what happens when one condition is true?
options: The computer stops and doesn't check the rest
Each condition has an equal chance
questions.explanation: Once a condition is true and its code runs, the rest of the chain is skipped.
